Auriga Project — Data

Data

Information and documentation on how to use the catalogues, links to download the data, supplementary material and example scripts that can be used to read and extract relevant data can be found here.

In addition, a table listing the properties of HI discs in the Auriga simulations can be found here.

For more information please contact Robert Grand.
